heading: Military commission to announce action
label: 949n Military commission to announce action
text: A military commission under this chapter shall announce its findings and sentence to the parties as soon as determined.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 949n, added , , , required a military commission to announce its findings and sentence as soon as determined, prior to the general amendment of this chapter by .Pub. L. 109–366, § 3(a)(1)120 Stat. 2617Pub. L. 111–84Oct. 17, 2006
